form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, 2nd of 14 at this track on March 20 over 1408m, 1.75 len behind Glitter And Glory with 61kg at $2. Great chance to get off the mark.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Finished off last campaign third of 11 at Leopardstown October 18 over 1609m, 2.75 len behind Ex Animo carrying 59.5kg at $17. On debut ninth of 16 at Naas September 18 over 1408m, 10 len behind Port Ferdinand carrying 60.5kg at $11. Progressive and expected to measure up.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Resuming after a six months break. form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when 2nd of 13 at this track on November 7 over 1609m, head behind Manton Bay with 59.5kg at $4.50. Expected to run a bold race again.

form.formComment: By Zoustar out of La Foglietta on debut. Purchased for GNS 16,000 (Tattersalls 2023 December Foal Sale). Prefer to just watch barring a strong market move.
